response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with strong testing culture and some genuinely high-scale systems exposure, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His C++ experience amounts to roughly a year (National Instruments plus a thesis project) against a requirement of 8 years, his systems-level work is primarily in DLang and TypeScript, and his career centers on web and product engineering rather than cloud compute infrastructure. He also lacks a formal technical-leadership track record of owning platform strategy across teams, which is the heart of this position.
strengths: Real high-throughput, low-latency systems experience (microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship and testing depth, including authoring test frameworks and practicing TDD/CI/CD
Proven mentor and knowledge-sharer through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
Limited large-scale cloud/compute platform experience; no demonstrated ownership of cloud architecture or infrastructure strategy
No formal technical-lead role managing cross-team priorities, deadlines, and deliverables

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform and infrastructure leadership depth
Low-latency distributed systems and mentoring background
